TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Bradley Beal == Bradley Beal hya ga NBA pgnaw mari misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'agal tins' tay suruw. kawas tay 1993, ryax sa tay 28 nqu tay 6, Bradley Beal, squliq na p'unro. Bradley Beal gocyu mqwas beh Chaminade College Preparatory pqwasan biru. kawas tay 2010, sangka 2010 FIBA Under-17 World Championship, magan icibang. kawas tay 2011, pinwagan Gatorade National Player of the Year. hiya ga baq balay kmayal ego. Bradley Beal maki qutux mlikuy laqi, Luka lalu nya. hopa pqwasan biru nya kawas tay 2009 11 byacing 30 ryax, wal magal kragan gunro na pira qsasa ru musa mqwas hopa pqwasan biru University of Florida. kawas tay 2011,11 byacing 29 ryax ga wal tluw Southeastern Conference pitu ryax qani na piyang zqaws squilq. pincyuwagan nya' ryax qnxan nqu Bradley Beal sa senmung pgnawgan mari'. NBA kanamuhay mimaliay a sikadademec(2018,2019) pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga pqwsan biru krahu cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: == ő≤ra*lej ő≤eal == ő≤ra*lej ő≤eal ńßja …£a nő≤a p…£naw mari mis~…ēuw qanij, qutux s~…ēa p Ēa…£al tins~…ē Ē taj s~…ēuruw. kawas~…ē taj ****, rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, ő≤ra*lej ő≤eal, s~…ēquliq na p Ēunro. ő≤ra*lej ő≤eal …£o ¶~ ®ju mqwas~…ē ő≤eńß ¶~ ®ńßamina*e ¶~ ®olle…£e preparatorj pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru. kawas~…ē taj ****, s~…ēaŇčka **** *iő≤a un*er-** worl* ¶~ ®ńßampions~…ēńßip, ma…£an i ¶~ ®iő≤aŇč. kawas~…ē taj ****, pinwa…£an …£atora*e national plajer o* tńße jear. ńßija …£a ő≤aq ő≤alaj kmajal e…£o. ő≤ra*lej ő≤eal maki qutux mlikuj laqi, luka lalu nja. ńßopa pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru nja kawas~…ē taj **** ** ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč ** rjax, wal ma…£al kra…£an …£unro na pira qs~…ēas~…ēa ru mus~…ēa mqwas~…ē ńßopa pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru uni*ers~…ēitj o* *lori*a. kawas~…ē taj ****,** ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč ** rjax …£a wal tluw s~…ēoutńßeas~…ētern ¶~ ®on*eren ¶~ ®e pitu rjax qani na pijaŇč zqaws~…ē s~…ēquilq. pin ¶~ ®juwa…£an nja Ē rjax qnxan nqu ő≤ra*lej ő≤eal s~…ēa s~…ēenmuŇč p…£naw…£an mari Ē. nő≤a kanamuńßaj mimaliaj a s~…ēika*a*eme ¶~ ®(****,****) ps~…ēpŇčan mari s~…ēa maj ju…£al ja ¶~ ®iŇč mas~…ēuq ms~…ēpuŇč mari s~…ēa ps~…ēpŇčan mari na maj ¶~ ®ju…£al ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč l…£a pqws~…ēan ő≤iru krańßu ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
S.FORM: == Bradley Beal == Bradley Beal hya ga NBA pgnaw mari misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'agal tins' tay suruw. kawas tay 1993, ryax sa tay 28 nqu tay 6, Bradley Beal, squliq na p'unro. Bradley Beal gocyu mqwas beh Chaminade College Preparatory pqwasan biru. kawas tay 2010, sangka 2010 FIBA Under-17 World Championship, magan icibang. kawas tay 2011, pinwagan Gatorade National Player of the Year. hiya ga baq balay kmayal ego. Bradley Beal maki qutux mlikuy laqi, Luka lalu nya. hopa pqwasan biru nya kawas tay 2009 11 byacing 30 ryax, wal magal kragan gunro na pira qsasa ru musa mqwas hopa pqwasan biru University of Florida. kawas tay 2011,11 byacing 29 ryax ga wal tluw Southeastern Conference pitu ryax qani na piyang zqaws squilq. pincyuwagan nya' ryax qnxan nqu Bradley Beal sa senmung pgnawgan mari'. NBA kanamuhay mimaliay a sikadademec(2018,2019) pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga pqwsan biru krahu cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
